article.title: Dell, HP Inc. Shares Jump on Acquisition Speculation Report
article.summary: Shares of Dell Technologies Inc. and HP Inc. jumped after a report from website SemiAccurate that Nvidia Corp. was seeking an acquisition that would “reshape the PC landscape.”
article.title_zh: Dell 和 HP Inc. 股價因收購猜測報導而上漲
article.summary_zh: 在 SemiAccurate 網站報導 Nvidia 尋求收購以「重塑 PC 格局」後，Dell Technologies Inc. 和 HP Inc. 的股價上漲。

article.title: EU clears Orange’s full acquisition of MasOrange
article.summary: The deal will see Orange take sole control of MasOrange, the operator formed through the merger of Orange and MásMóvil in 2024 In sum – what to know: Regulatory clearance – The European Commission approved the deal under a simplified…
article.summary_zh: 該交易將使Orange獲得MasOrange的完全控制權，MasOrange是Orange與MásMóvil在2024年合併形成的運營商。歐盟委員會在簡化程序下批准了該交易。

article.title: Roblox Adds Youth Accounts As Push for Social Media Bans Grows
article.summary: Roblox is introducing special accounts for younger children and teens, aiming to separate the gaming platform from social media amid the rise of lawsuits and bans. Roblox CEO Dave Baszucki joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Roblox 推出青年帳戶，應對社群媒體禁令浪潮
article.summary_zh: Roblox 為年幼兒童和青少年推出特殊帳戶，試圖將遊戲平台與社群媒體區分開來，以應對訴訟和禁令的增加。

article.title: Alienware AW2726DM 27-inch QHD 240 Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor review: A price breakthrough for desktop OLED
article.summary: Alienware smashes price barriers with the AW2726DM. It’s a 27-inch QHD QD-OLED with 240 Hz, Adaptive-Sync, HDR10, and wide gamut color with an opening price of just $350.
article.title_zh: Alienware AW2726DM 27 英寸 QHD 240 Hz QD-OLED 電競顯示器評測：桌面 OLED 的價格突破
article.summary_zh: Alienware 以 AW2726DM 打破價格障礙，這是一款 27 英寸 QHD QD-OLED 顯示器，具有 240 Hz、Adaptive-Sync、HDR10 和廣色域，起價僅為 $350。

article.title: Macron Leads EU Push to Coordinate Social Media Bans for Minors
article.summary: French President Emmanuel Macron and a group of European Union leaders pushing to restrict social media use among minors are set to meet remotely on Thursday to coordinate their efforts.
article.title_zh: 馬克宏領導歐盟推動協調未成年人社交媒體禁令
article.summary_zh: 法國總統埃馬紐埃爾·馬克宏和一組推動限制未成年人使用社交媒體的歐盟領導人定於週四舉行遠程會議，協調各自的努力。

article.title: Android brands could adopt rumored iPhone 18 Pro color for upcoming flagships
article.summary: Brands copying Apple are nothing new, and they are never going to stop. According to a recent leak, several Android smartphone makers are currently testing a new color finish that Apple is rumored to introduce with the upcoming iPhone 18 Pro series. The iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are rumored to arrive in a new deep red color option. Now, tipster Digital Chat Station claims that next-generation Android flagships are already testing a similar finish. Image via DCS It’s also likely that a number of mid-range and budget smartphones will adopt this colorway, aiming to...
article.title_zh: Android 品牌可能採用傳聞中的 iPhone 18 Pro 配色用於即將推出的旗艦機
article.summary_zh: 根據最近的洩露消息，多家 Android 智慧手機製造商正在測試 Apple 據傳將在 iPhone 18 Pro 系列中推出的新配色。

article.title: Google Wallet wants to give you more say over how your sensitive passes are shared
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google Wallet is adding the ability to control how private passes work with Google services like Autofill. Users will soon see per-pass privacy settings for private passes, as announced by Google in the latest Play Services update. Google has shared details of its April update to Google Play services, which includes a small but meaningful privacy change in Google Wallet .
article.title_zh: Google Wallet 希望讓用戶更好地控制敏感通行證的分享方式
article.summary_zh: Google Wallet 正在增加控制私密通行證如何與 Google Autofill 等服務配合的能力。用戶很快將看到私密通行證的每個通行證隱私設定。

article.title: Booking.com 爆資料外洩，駭客竊取全球旅客預訂資訊
article.summary: 知名旅遊訂房平台 Booking.com 傳出資料外洩事件，部分使用者近日陸續收到官方警示郵件，指出「未經授權 […]
article.title_zh: Booking.com 爆資料外洩，駭客竊取全球旅客預訂資訊
article.summary_zh: 知名旅遊訂房平台 Booking.com 傳出資料外洩事件，部分使用者近日陸續收到官方警示郵件，指出「未經授權 […]

article.title: Nvidia says AI cuts 10-month, eight-engineer GPU design task to overnight job — company is still 'a long way' from AI designing chips without human input
article.summary: Nvidia widely uses AI for different stages of the chip design process, though it admits that AI is a long way from designing chips completely autonomously.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 表示 AI 將 10 個月、8 名工程師的 GPU 設計任務縮短至一夜之間——公司距離 AI 完全不需人工輸入設計晶片仍「相差很遠」
article.summary_zh: Nvidia 在晶片設計流程的各個階段廣泛使用 AI，但承認 AI 距離完全自主設計晶片還很遠。

article.title: Meta spins up AI version of Mark Zuckerberg to engage with employees
article.summary: Meta is building an artificial intelligence version of Mark Zuckerberg that can engage with employees in his stead, as part of a broader push to remake the Big Tech company around AI. The $1.6 trillion group has been working on developing photorealistic, AI-powered 3D characters that users can interact with in real time, according to four people familiar with the matter. The company recently began prioritizing a Zuckerberg AI character, three of the people said. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: Meta 推出 Mark Zuckerberg 的 AI 版本與員工互動
article.summary_zh: Meta 正在開發 Mark Zuckerberg 的人工智能版本，以代替他與員工互動，這是該公司圍繞 AI 進行全面改造的一部分。這家市值 1.6 兆美元的科技巨頭一直在開發逼真的 AI 驅動 3D 角色。

article.title: Latest Galaxy Watch update could be a drain on battery, according to user reports
article.summary: Users are reporting faster-than-normal battery drain on their Galaxy Watches, with some reporting it occurred after a recent update. Others suggest it’s a Google Play Services issue. more…
article.title_zh: 最新 Galaxy Watch 更新可能導致電池耗電加速
article.summary_zh: 用戶反映 Galaxy Watch 在最近更新後出現異常快速的電池耗電，部分使用者認為可能與 Google Play Services 相關。

article.title: FT: ‘Meta Builds AI Version of Mark Zuckerberg to Interact With Staff’
article.title_zh: FT：「Meta 開發 Mark Zuckerberg AI 版本與員工互動」

article.title: Google brings back Pixel Referral Program: 10% off phones, $50 Store credit
article.summary: After the last round that started with the Pixel 10 launch ended in February, the Pixel Referral Program is back. more…
article.title_zh: Google 重新推出 Pixel 推薦計劃：手機享 10% 優惠，獲得 $50 商店信用
article.summary_zh: Pixel 推薦計劃在 Pixel 10 發布開始的上一輪於二月結束後回歸。

article.title: Apple @ Work Podcast: PocketMDM brings Apple Business Manager to your pocket
article.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional-grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage & protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work-ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . In this episode of Apple @ Work, Joshua Patrick joins the show to talk about his new app: PocketMDM . more…
article.title_zh: Apple @ Work Podcast：PocketMDM 將 Apple Business Manager 帶到您的口袋
article.summary_zh: Apple @ Work 由 Mosyle Apple Unified Platform 獨家贊助。Mosyle 是唯一將所有必要解決方案整合在單一專業級平台上的方案，可無縫自動部署、管理及保護企業 Apple 裝置。

article.title: Veteran Windows dev shows off AI running on 47-year-old PDP11 with 6 MHz CPU and 64KB of RAM — 'gloriously absurd' project runs transformer model written in PDP-11 assembly language
article.summary: Ancient 6 MHz ‘PDP11 can train a neural network’ says veteran dev.
article.title_zh: 資深 Windows 開發者展示 AI 運行在 47 年前的 PDP-11 上，採用 6 MHz CPU 和 64KB RAM——「光榮地荒謬」的專案用 PDP-11 組合語言執行 transformer 模型
article.summary_zh: 一位資深開發者表示古老的 6 MHz PDP-11 可以訓練神經網路。
